buildkit_push.note: Both images pushed; final public verification later performed from replacement builder pod.

eval_image_smoke.reason: Full local-eval image smoke would pull the large image and run host Docker/KVM; source tests, dry-run, and public digest proof passed. Previous non-image OSWorld live eval completed separately.

serving_smoke.reason: H200 reservation smoke requires scheduling a pod with this image; plan allows command validation when reservation is unavailable, but this remains a follow-up for runtime confidence.
